name: Access Search
message: Access Search, Inc. was founded with one simple mission: to be an honest, diligent, and knowledgeable search firm. With that goal in mind, we assembled the organization that exists today. We take great pride in our team. Each recruiter at ASI has several years of recruiting experience coupled with years of valuable experience in Big 4 public accounting and/or Fortune 500 finance. We come from some of Chicago's finest employers including Andersen Consulting, Deloitte & Touche, Ernst & Young, KPMG, Baxter International, Platinum Technology International, R.R. Donnelley & Sons, Unilever, Cardinal Heath, and Sears Roebuck & Company. Our recruiters draw upon their collective knowledge to present our clients with carefully screened and informed business professionals.
